settings.name: Thomas Sannasardo
settings.resume: Customer Service Professional with over 20 years of experience resolving complex client inquiries and ensuring satisfaction across phone, email, and chat platforms. Pairing this extensive client-facing background with robust technical expertise in Python, Bash, PowerShell, and GUI development to automate workflows and optimize systems. Seeking a role that bridges the gap between high-level customer support and technical engineering to deliver enterprise-grade solutions.
